F:\anzhuang\arm-gun-gcc\bin\arm-none-eabi-gcc.exe -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -O3 -DNDEBUG -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -specs=nano.specs -specs=nosys.specs -TF:/download/1111/plant_assistant/demo/Project/CMAKE_Project/gd32f470zk.ld -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--no-warn-rwx-segments -Wl,-Map=F:/download/1111/plant_assistant/demo/Project/CMAKE_Project/build/PLANT_ASSISTANT.map,--cref -lc -lm -lnosys -u _printf_float
